race.comment: COSTLESS (5) was much better second-up at Bordertown and then was okay third-up in a strong form race when finishing midfield at Balaklava. Finds the right race this time and can get the job done. ZATANNA (7) made progress last time out, finishing third here after being in the firing line on the corner. Has good early speed and gets in light with the 3kg claimer engaged. Is sure to give a bold sight. BJARNE (2) is a distance specialist who turned in a decent effort last start to finish second over 1200m at this track. Got things back on track last time and can keep things going in the right direction. ONE KIND (6) was sent to town first-up and held a prominent position early before dropping out in the lane. Fitter now and should improver with that run under her belt. THE HASS (8) returns and has a solid fresh record. Takes benefit from a trial win in readiness and gets in light with the 2kg claim. Not dismissing.
